name: product-playbook
description: A 12-phase product playbook for solo builders and small teams — taking an idea from 'I think there's something here' to a buildable backlog — with optional push of artifacts into the team's toolchain (GitHub Issues, Jira, Linear, Confluence, Notion, Figma) via vendor MCPs. Bundled with a multi-POV antagonist skill for stress-testing each phase.
